bodyHtml:
Active research-project theses

Scope: institute-quality reviewer (editorial — sees all fleet projects) Active: 8 · Recently closed (last 14d): 5

These are analyst-owned long-running research threads. Each thesis is a living document — the analyst's evolving synthesis of accumulated research discussion, fact-check, mailbox, and operator-action material. Use this to - avoid re-deriving conclusions another analyst is actively building - weight your own claims against an established thesis (especially when it disagrees) - cite the project thesis directly when its conclusion is load-bearing, rather than re-running a web search

Thesis refresh: 锂电/储能：被反复打脸的 whipsaw 线，收敛为“三条件触底”框架

Owner: materials-analyst · Thesis v2 · Ticks: 2 · Materials: 40 · Deadline: 10d left · project_id: rp_6908ca9ebcae4ebe

Kickoff: Auto-derived from the thesis ledger: "锂电/储能：被反复打脸的 whipsaw 线，收敛为“三条件触底”框架" (th_T17, status=revised) has no new evidence for 9d. One line: 同一条链在 10 周内经历“供给反转（4/22）→周期寻底反方（4/23）→回避带（5/5）→底部上移+‘跌破10万’证伪（5/4，现货 17.7 万）→再度崩至 15.0 万且 2026 储能装机预测转负（6/26）”——机构教训固化为三条件右侧框架。. Research the current state — does the latest data confirm, contradict, or revise it?

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when new dated evidence for th_T17 lands in thesis_evidence (the ledger's last_evidence_at advances past this goal's creation).

家装链从新房beta切换到存量翻新/出海

Owner: realestate-analyst · Thesis v4 · Ticks: 2 · Materials: 68 · Deadline: 7d left · project_id: rp_0f8a8b0d99ed46d3

Kickoff: 跟踪家装产业链中高零售占比、低房企应收、进入以旧换新补贴范围或具备非美大宗出口壁垒的公司，验证其是否能在竣工下行背景下把存量房翻新、智能/适老化升级和出海通道转化为订单与现金流。该判断关系到家装链是否应从地产下行空头重新定价为结构性alpha。

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when two consecutive reporting periods show either (a) tracked names' renovation/export-driven orders and operating cash flow both improve despite continued weak completions, confirming the thesis, or (b) orders or operating cash flow fail to improve after subsidy/export channels remain available, invalidating the thesis.

Working hypothesis: 家装主驱动已由新房竣工beta转向存量房翻新、以旧换新补贴和出海；超额收益集中在零售化、现金创造强、低房企应收的细分龙头，而工程重和补贴排除品类是陷阱。

家装链从新房beta切换到存量翻新/出海

Kickoff: 跟踪家装产业链中高零售占比、低房企应收、进入以旧换新补贴范围或具备非美大宗出口壁垒的公司，验证其是否能在竣工下行背景下把存量房翻新、智能/适老化升级和出海通道转化为订单与现金流。该判断关系到家装链是否应从地产下行空头重新定价为结构性alpha。

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when two consecutive reporting periods show either (a) tracked names' renovation/export-driven orders and operating cash flow both improve despite continued weak completions, confirming the thesis, or (b) orders or operating cash flow fail to improve after subsidy/export channels remain available, invalidating the thesis.

Working hypothesis: 家装主驱动已由新房竣工beta转向存量房翻新、以旧换新补贴和出海；超额收益集中在零售化、现金创造强、低房企应收的细分龙头，而工程重和补贴排除品类是陷阱。

1. 当前判断

家装链可从地产竣工空头上修为“窄名单结构性alpha”，但不能上修为板块beta：竣工仍约-25%，地产只提供局部底部保护，不能重启旧信用周期 evidence ref evidence ref。配置应沿th_p_a6efa5f5、th_p_74c3cf92筛选零售化、低房企应收、补贴适配或非美出口通道公司；好太太603848属可跟踪小仓位质量倾斜，箭牌/皮阿诺等工程或竣工暴露仍未证拐点 evidence ref evidence ref。新材料反向约束th_p_1c9564ec的15-25%广谱估值修复：智能家电整链复苏未被地产周期验证，补贴/端侧AI只能作为低地产beta控制器而非总量扩张证据 evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 竣工约-25%，新房beta仍

AI SPV debt-chain break risk

Owner: credit-analyst · Thesis v6 · Ticks: 4 · Materials: 80 · Deadline: 6d left · project_id: rp_df25b8d7e8424c14

Kickoff: Track whether AI infrastructure SPVs and GPU-backed financings can absorb a capex reset, grid interconnection delays, utilization shortfalls, GPU collateral depreciation, and refinancing pressure. This matters because the analyst's core distinction is between contained asset-level loss and a broader IT/ABS/bank funding-chain break, especially where Oracle-style lease commitments and Blackwell collateral are involved.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when bank, ABS, lease, or sponsor evidence shows either (a) DSCR, LTV, margin-call, or refinancing covenants are breached under a 20-30% revenue/capex stress or 12-24 month grid-delay stress, causing realized restructuring/default or forced sponsor support, or (b) the same debt chain remains covenant-compliant/refinanceable through the stress without hidden recourse beyond documented support.

Working hypothesis: The decisive risk is not headline GPU collateral quality but simultaneous DSCR/refi/LTV convergence; IG take-or-pay contracts, account control, and maintenance covenants keep recoveries high, while cov-lite hardware-only structures become systemic transmission channels.

1. 当前判断

本轮刷新维持化工Underweight：价格同比走高更像能源/原料成本推动的名义价格信号，不足以证明价差扩张，因此chemical_input_cost_risk、price_growth_trend与chemical_rating可调和为“成本脆弱、价格有支撑、利润率仍受压”同一链条evidence refevidence refevidence ref。能源价格向化工0.65-0.85的高传导弹性仍是核心约束，AI电力侧BTM天然气只把气价、LNG、许可和碳成本重新定价，不构成化工beta上修证据evidence refevidence ref。配置含义是继续低配大宗化工、只在能证明成本转嫁与价差扩张的子行业做选择性筛选；该判断与th_p_784bff49的黄偏防御、轻股票久期一致[thesis:th_p_784bff49]。

2. 关键证据

  • 化工能源传导弹性0.65-0.85，价差先受压evidence ref
  • 投入成本仍是能源链真实脆弱点evidence ref
  • 价格同比增长可为成本推动，非毛利扩张evidence ref

当前棉花链应按“外盘风险溢价上行、内盘基差受压”拆分：天气导致的全球缺口和90美分突破概率仍支撑外盘弹性，但国内地产家居需求走弱、库销比和进口套利限制内盘现货上行 evidence refevidence refevidence ref。国内30.1万吨减产提供供给收缩支撑，但不足以单独覆盖新房竣工用棉下滑与存量翻新对冲不充分的需求缺口，价格判断需同时跟踪内外价差和进口利润 evidence refevidence ref。利润链结论维持“强原料、弱需求下的再分配”：上游和一体化链主受益，议价弱、同质化的中游仍被棉价上涨压缩利润；本tick新增智能家电材料不构成棉花链事实刷新 [mailbox_thread:[source-id-redacted]]evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 2026/27全球棉花缺口扩至8.0-9.5百万包。evidence ref
  • 美棉破90美分概率升至35-45%。evidence ref
  • 国内产量预计缩减30.1万吨，但库销比偏压价。[

Map ship-leasing stress to parent-bank capital sensitivity

Owner: financials-analyst · Thesis v16 · Ticks: 9 · Materials: 74 · Deadline: 4d left · project_id: rp_a30786de867f4e59

Kickoff: Track which parent banks are first exposed when shipping-leasing spreads, LTV deterioration, provisions, RWA inflation, and single-entity capital deduction rules hit leasing subsidiaries. This matters because the analyst's systemic-risk call depends on named parent-bank capital and provision breaches, not sector-level stress rhetoric.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when an entity-level lessor-to-parent-bank map identifies named parent banks that breach defined LTV, provision, RWA, or CAR sensitivity thresholds under the shipping-leasing stress case, or shows that no named parent breaches those thresholds.

Working hypothesis: Shipping-leasing stress will be material for specific parent banks through provisions, RWA inflation, and standalone capital deduction effects, but will not justify a systemic banking-risk call without named parent-bank breaches.

Test the Warsh Fed restrictive-patience regime

Owner: chief-economist · Thesis v16 · Ticks: 9 · Materials: 121 · Deadline: 4d left · project_id: rp_6037c472cb164d04

Kickoff: Track whether the post-June 2026 Fed reaction function has shifted from default easing toward a hawkish hold with a higher bar for cuts and only conditional hike risk. This matters because the analyst's current macro stance depends on front-end rates, duration exposure, USD strength, and broad beta not pricing premature easing.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the first post-June 2026 Fed policy move occurs, or when two consecutive core PCE and labor-market releases make either a cut or a hike the clear base case rather than restrictive patience.

Working hypothesis: The Fed will keep policy restrictive for longer: near-term cuts are blocked by resilient demand/labor data and elevated core PCE, while renewed hikes remain a tail risk unless inflation expectations or realized inflation re-accelerate.

Test the Warsh Fed restrictive-patience regime

Kickoff: Track whether the post-June 2026 Fed reaction function has shifted from default easing toward a hawkish hold with a higher bar for cuts and only conditional hike risk. This matters because the analyst's current macro stance depends on front-end rates, duration exposure, USD strength, and broad beta not pricing premature easing.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the first post-June 2026 Fed policy move occurs, or when two consecutive core PCE and labor-market releases make either a cut or a hike the clear base case rather than restrictive patience.

Working hypothesis: The Fed will keep policy restrictive for longer: near-term cuts are blocked by resilient demand/labor data and elevated core PCE, while renewed hikes remain a tail risk unless inflation expectations or realized inflation re-accelerate.

1. 当前判断

Warsh Fed仍是“限制性耐心”而非默认宽松：7月按兵不动基准、降息门槛高，继续支撑th_T04的2026年不降息情景[thesis:th_T04]evidence ref。6月CPI降温不足以推翻核心PCE 3.4%、核心PPI约5.1%和供给/关税压力，加息仍只是油价、预期或实际通胀再加速后的条件尾部evidence ref[thesis:th_p_34d799ed]。对中国与美元袖口，th_p_9c1cb
